About Me

From Code to Insights

I am a Computer Science student with a strong foundation in programming, data structures, and analytical problem-solving. My passion lies in transforming raw data into actionable business intelligence.

Through self-directed learning and hands-on projects, I have developed end-to-end data analysis skills spanning data cleaning, statistical analysis, visualization, and strategic recommendations.

I am actively seeking a Data Analyst internship where I can contribute real value while continuing to grow professionally in a fast-paced, data-driven environment.

Portfolio

Featured Projects

Real-world business problems, professional datasets, and actionable insights — end to end.

01
Sales Analysis

Regional Sales Performance Analysis

RetailTech Corp needed to understand why revenue growth was inconsistent across regions. I analyzed 1,200 transactions across 4 regions, 5 products, and 12 months to identify revenue drivers, seasonal patterns, and margin opportunities.

Tools Used
Python Pandas Seaborn SQL Excel Power BI
Key Insights
  • North region generates 31% of revenue with the highest revenue-per-rep ratio
  • Q4 contributes 38% of annual revenue — holiday seasonality is the #1 demand driver
  • Headphones carry 54% profit margin vs. Tablets at 31% — clear pricing opportunity
  • Top 2 reps account for 29% of total profit — Pareto principle in action
SQL Highlight
-- Revenue & margin by region SELECT Region, ROUND(SUM(Revenue), 2) AS Total_Revenue, ROUND(SUM(Profit)/SUM(Revenue)*100,2) AS Margin_Pct, RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SUM(Revenue) DESC) AS rnk FROM sales_data GROUP BY Region;
Recommendations
  • Increase Q4 inventory for Laptops & Smartphones by 25–30%
  • Pilot a Headphones + Smartwatch bundle in the South region
  • Pair top reps with bottom performers for knowledge transfer
02
Marketing Analytics

Multi-Channel Marketing Campaign Analysis

GrowthPulse Agency overspent on PPC by 15% in Q2. I audited 800 campaign records across 6 channels and 5 industries to build a data-driven budget reallocation framework that projects +12% revenue at identical spend.

Tools Used
Python Pandas Matplotlib SQL Power BI
Key Insights
  • Email delivers 187% avg ROI — dramatically underinvested at just 8% of budget
  • PPC shows negative ROI above $8K spend — clear diminishing returns threshold
  • SEO has the lowest CPA ($14 avg) — most cost-efficient long-term channel
  • Tech industry + Influencer = 3× higher CVR than any other segment combination
SQL Highlight
-- Channel ROI tier classification SELECT Campaign, ROUND(AVG(ROI_pct), 1) AS Avg_ROI, ROUND(AVG(CPA), 2) AS Avg_CPA, CASE WHEN AVG(ROI_pct) > 100 THEN 'High' WHEN AVG(ROI_pct) > 0 THEN 'Mid' ELSE 'Low' END AS Tier FROM campaign_data GROUP BY Campaign ORDER BY Avg_ROI DESC;
Recommendations
  • Reallocate 20% of PPC budget to Email + SEO — projects +12% revenue
  • Cap individual PPC campaigns at $6K to stay in positive-return zone
  • Build industry-specific playbooks: Healthcare→Email, Tech→Influencer
03
E-Commerce

E-Commerce Funnel & Performance Analysis

ShopNow had +22% traffic but stagnant revenue. I analyzed 3,600+ session records across devices, categories, and traffic sources to diagnose conversion drop-offs worth ~$420K annually and recommend UX fixes.

Tools Used
Python Pandas Seaborn Excel Power BI
Key Insights
  • Mobile converts at 2.1% vs Desktop's 5.4% — a 2.5× gap worth ~$420K/year
  • Social media has 61% bounce rate — landing pages mismatched to ad creative
  • Email converts 4.8× better than Social, yet drives 60% fewer sessions
  • Clothing/Mobile has the highest return rate (11.2%) — sizing uncertainty on small screens
Python Highlight
# Conversion funnel by device funnel_cols = ['Add_to_Cart_Rate_pct', 'Checkout_Rate_pct', 'Purchase_Rate_pct'] funnel = df.groupby('Device')[funnel_cols].mean() # Drop-off calculation funnel['Cart→Purchase_dropoff'] = ( 1 - funnel['Purchase_Rate_pct'] / funnel['Add_to_Cart_Rate_pct'] ) * 100
Recommendations
  • Simplify mobile checkout to 2 steps + add Apple/Google Pay
  • Fix Social landing pages to match ad creative per campaign
  • Add AR size guide on Clothing/Mobile to cut 11.2% return rate
